visual_scope.primary_region: Related Work right column, Embodied simulation and synthetic scene benchmarks paragraph

change_summary: Rewrote the embodied-simulation related-work paragraph into shorter ACL-style sentences.
Kept Habitat, AI2-THOR, ThreeDWorld, Isaac Sim, Isaac Lab, GRUtopia, GRScenes, and InternNav/DualVLN as context systems rather than leaderboard targets.
Moved the KuJiaLe sentence to a bounded stack-entry-evidence claim instead of a broad navigation claim.
rejected_iteration_notes: A first rewrite removed some target splits but introduced AI2-/THOR, ThreeD-/World, and mate-/rial.
A citation-position rewrite removed the large post-citation gap but introduced ren-/dering and sim-/ulation.
A shorter USD/RTX/MDL rewrite introduced GRU-/topia, city-, Intern-, vision-, evalu-, and leader- style splits.
The accepted version keeps the page-2 target platform names intact and leaves the page-2 target paragraph without new target-region hyphen splits.

accepted_text_scan.next_round_candidate: Page 3 right-column Claim Registry opener: table appears as ta-/ble at the page bottom after the related-work paragraph shortened.
